title: nice-generate-exports config
description: Declares the public export surface of a nice-react-* component package.

$schema.description: Path to this schema file for IDE autocomplete.

description.description: Short JSDoc description emitted above exports. Max 5 lines.

default.description: Component name to re-export as the package default export.

components.description: Component names. Generator emits `export * from "./components/{Name}"` for each.

tokens.description: Subset of components that have token wrappers. Emits `{Name}Styles, get{Name}Token` from ./tokens.
